enrichments.summary: Those who worship Me with exclusive devotion — I carry what they lack and preserve what they have.
enrichments.modern_interpretation: Sincere devoted focus is met with support; trust can coexist with responsible effort.
practice: Do your part fully; then release tomorrow's provision anxiety in prayer or quiet trust.
enrichments.reflection_question: Where am I exhausting myself trying to secure what only trust can hold?
